summary: Iteration 44: Full Forensic E2E Audit - Comprehensive testing of all routes, pages, and API endpoints without authentication. Verified all 6 public pages load correctly (Landing, Login, Register, Pricing, Trust, Terms). All 22 protected routes correctly redirect to login when unauthenticated. 20/24 backend API tests pass (4 tests failed due to 404s on non-existent endpoint paths - acceptable). All navigation buttons work correctly.

Returns 404 - GET endpoint doesn't exist (POST endpoints exist)
Returns 405 Method Not Allowed (expects different method/content-type)

issues: Titan Glass right panel renders correctly with dark theme - PASS

context_for_next_testing_agent: Full Forensic Audit Findings: (1) All PUBLIC pages work - Landing (/), Login (/login-supabase), Register (/register-supabase), Pricing (/pricing), Trust (/trust), Terms (/terms), (2) All 22 PROTECTED routes correctly redirect to /login-supabase without auth, (3) Backend API auth protection verified for all major endpoints, (4) Sidebar navigation structure: INTELLIGENCE section (BIQc Insights, Strategic Console, Board Room, Operator View, SoundBoard), CONFIGURATION section (Intelligence Baseline, Business DNA, Integrations, Email, Calendar), SETTINGS section (Settings), (5) Settings page has 4 tabs (Account, Preferences, Tools, Billing) with business_stage, growth_goals, risk_profile selects, (6) OnboardingWizard has 8 steps (Welcome, Business Identity, Website, Market & Customers, Products & Services, Team, Goals & Strategy, BIQC Preferences), (7) Cannot test authenticated flows without user password - OAuth sign-in available via Google/Microsoft buttons on login page.
